misc.globals: provide global variables for eslint, for example, browser, node, es2021, etc

eslint.eslint: JavaScript code quality tool for finding and fixing problems in code
eslint.@eslint/js: provide JavaScript configuration rules and default settings for ESLint
eslint.vue-eslint-parser: provide Vue Single File Component (SFC) parsing support for ESLint
eslint.eslint-plugin-vue: ESLint plugin for Vue.js with rules for checking common Vue errors

prettier.prettier: code formatter tool to ensure consistent code style across the project
prettier.@vue/eslint-config-prettier: integrate Prettier configuration into ESLint to avoid rule conflicts

css.autoprefixer: automatically add vendor prefixes to CSS properties for cross-browser compatibility
css.postcss: CSS transformation tool for processing and optimizing CSS with plugins

cspell.cspell: spell checker tool for detecting spelling errors in code and documentation

quasar.@quasar/app-vite: Quasar framework CLI tool with Vite build system for cross-platform application development

vite.vite-plugin-checker: run TypeScript, ESLint and other static code checking tools in worker threads for fast feedback
vite.vite-plugin-compression2: Vite build optimization plugin that automatically generates gzip and brotli compressed files to reduce file size
